pricing.description: Prospect asks about pricing, cost, or rates
pricing.template_hint: Explain bespoke pricing, mention the Growth Consultation call analyses their setup and gives a tailored price structure + roadmap. Trendfeed caps clients at 15-20 for depth of service.

services.description: Prospect asks what services are offered
services.template_hint: Focus on the transformation (adding significant monthly revenue with no ad spend), not a fixed menu. Usually email & SMS, plus upsells, loyalty, referral programmes. Call to determine exact fit.

case_studies.description: Prospect asks for proof, case studies, or results
case_studies.template_hint: Confirm you have case studies. Offer to walk through results on the Growth Consultation call + custom roadmap.

pitch_deck.description: Prospect asks to send a pitch deck or presentation
pitch_deck.template_hint: No pre-defined deck because services are bespoke. The call provides tailored analysis.

referral.description: Prospect refers to another contact or person
referral.template_hint: FLAG FOR MANUAL HANDLING. Draft a warm intro email to the referred person.

niche_experience.description: Prospect asks about experience in their niche or industry
niche_experience.template_hint: REQUIRES WEBSITE LOOKUP. Scrape prospect's website, classify their category, pick 2-3 matching Trendfeed clients.

differentiation.description: Prospect asks what makes Trendfeed different or why choose you
differentiation.template_hint: Boutique, results-driven, scale vertically not horizontally. Max 15-20 clients. Strict vetting. Zero pressure. Money-back guarantee.

source.description: Prospect asks where you got their email or how you found them
source.template_hint: Keep it light. 'We came across {{companyName}} and saw great potential.' Pivot to value. NOTE: if they say unsubscribe/remove, classify as unsubscribe instead.

consistency.description: Prospect questions results consistency, failed clients, or asks about failures
consistency.template_hint: Honest: can't work for every brand. But results are common because of strict vetting. That's why the guarantee exists.

risk.description: Prospect expresses concern about risk or has been burned before
risk.template_hint: Empathise. Bringing in the wrong client hurts Trendfeed too. Initial call determines if it's a home-run, then they de-risk it.

guarantee.description: Prospect asks about guarantees or performance-based pricing
guarantee.template_hint: Full money-back guarantee. Also open to pure performance on a case-by-case basis. Need to analyse their situation first.

existing_agency.description: Prospect already has an email agency or is doing email marketing themselves
existing_agency.template_hint: Congrats on existing work. Experience with 150+ partners shows there's always room to grow. Brief chat → free audit doc → useful tips either way.

send_examples.description: Prospect asks to see examples of work or client references
send_examples.template_hint: Happy to share after confirming mutual fit on a brief call. Won't bother existing clients for references before that.

book_call_with_us.description: Prospect asks us to book a call with them or their team instead
book_call_with_us.template_hint: Politely redirect to Calendly. The form collects context + triggers prep automations.

free_trial.description: Prospect asks for a free trial or doesn't want to pay
free_trial.template_hint: Empathise but Trendfeed is a business with expenses. After working with 150+ 7 & 8 figure clients, Trendfeed knows what it can deliver.

auto_reply.description: Auto-reply or out of office message
auto_reply.template_hint: IGNORE. Do not draft. Log as Auto-reply.

unsubscribe.description: Prospect wants to unsubscribe or be removed from the list
unsubscribe.template_hint: DO NOT DRAFT. Flag in Slack immediately. Process unsubscribe in PlusVibe.

hostile.description: Prospect is rude, angry, or aggressive
hostile.template_hint: Draft a brief polite close-out. Flag for manager.

interested.description: Prospect is interested, wants to proceed, or asks to book a call
interested.template_hint: Warm response confirming the call. Direct to Calendly link.

uncategorised.description: Reply doesn't fit any known category
uncategorised.template_hint: Draft best-effort response. Flag as Uncategorised for manager + potential new template.
